name: Morozoff Limited
summary: Morozoff Limited manufactures and sells confectionery products in Japan and internationally. It offers cookies, cream cheesecakes, and custard puddings. The company was formerly known as Morozoff Seika Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Morozoff Limited in August 1972. Morozoff Limited was founded in 1931 and is based in Kobe, Japan.
